</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: center; background-color: white"><b>INNOVATIVE PAYMENT
SOLUTIONS, INC.</b></p><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: center; background-color: white"><b>NOTES TO THE CONSOLIDATED
FINANCIAL STATEMENTS</b></p><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify; background-color: white"><b>&#160;</b></p><div>

</div><ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c0" escape="true" name="us-gaap:IntangibleAssetsDisclosureTextBlock" id="ixv-7174"><table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0in"/><td style="width: 0.5in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>7</b></span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>INTANGIBLES</b></span></td>
</tr></table>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: center">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
August 26, 2021, the Company formed Beyond Fintech to acquire a product known as Beyond Wallet from a third party for gross proceeds of
$<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c50" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromSaleOfIntangibleAssets" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14186">250,000</ix:nonFraction>, together with the logo, use of name and implementation of the product into the Company&#8217;s technology. The Company owned&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c81" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:EquityMethodInvestmentOwnershipPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14187">51</ix:nonFraction>%
of Beyond Fintech with the other&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c82" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:EquityMethodInvestmentOwnershipPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14188">49</ix:nonFraction>% owned by Frictionless. Up until the date of disposal, the Company invested a further $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c50" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:AdditionalAmountForAcquisitionOfAsset" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14189">77,211</ix:nonFraction>
on the software to further enhance the Beyond Wallet product offering.&#160; On May 12, 2023, Beyond Fintech was sold to Frictionless
(see note 4 above).</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">During
the year ended December 31, 2021, the Company paid gross proceeds of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c83" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromSaleOfIntangibleAssets" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14190">375,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;to Frictionless for the development of the IPSIPay
wallet, and up until the date of novation, the Company invested a further $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c83" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:AdditionalAmountForAcquisitionOfAsset" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14191">1,171,805</ix:nonFraction> to facilitate the functioning of the IPSIPay software
in the cloud environment.&#160;On September 5, 2023, the Company novated all its rights and obligations to its IPSIPay wallet to a third
party (see note 5 above).</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">&#160;</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Amortization
expense was $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c0" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:AmortizationOfIntangibleAssets" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14192">0</ix:nonFraction> and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c5" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:AmortizationOfIntangibleAssets" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14193">347,298</ix:nonFraction>&#160;for the years ended December 31, 2024 and 2023, respectively.</span></p></ix:nonNumeric><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: center; background-color: white">&#160;</p><div>

</div><ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c0" escape="true" name="us-gaap:EquityMethodInvestmentsDisclosureTextBlock" id="ixv-7197"><table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0in"/><td style="width: 0.5in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>8</b></span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>EQUITY METHOD INVESTMENT</b></span></td>
</tr></table>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
April 28, 2023, the Company formed IPSIPay Express with OpenPath and EfinityPay (see note 1(b) above). As described in note 1(b), the
Company has agreed to make the IPSI Capital Contributions to IPSIPay Express. As of December 31, 2023, the initial Tranche of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c3" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:CapitalContributionInitialTrancheAmount" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14194">500,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;and
the second Tranche of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c3" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:CapitalContributionSecondTrancheAmount" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14195">500,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;of capital contributions was paid by the Company to or on behalf of IPSIPay Express.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c0" escape="true" name="us-gaap:EquityMethodInvestmentsTextBlock" id="ixv-7211"><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
Company accounts for its investment in IPSIPay Express in accordance with&#160;ASC 323,&#160;Investments &#8211; Equity Method and Joint
Ventures, the movement in equity method investments related to IPSIPay Express for the period ended December 31, 2024 and 2023 is as
follow:</span></p>

</div><ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c0" escape="true" name="us-gaap:InvestmentTextBlock" id="ixv-7384"><table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0in"/><td style="width: 0.5in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>9</b></span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>INVESTMENTS</b></span></td>
</tr></table>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: center">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white"><b>Investment
in Frictionless Financial Technologies Inc.</b></span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify"><b>&#160;</b></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
May 12, 2023, the Company assigned to Frictionless all common stock of Frictionless owned by the Company (representing a&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c84" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:MinorityInterestOwnershipPercentageByParent" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14217">10</ix:nonFraction>% ownership
interest in Frictionless). refer Note 4 above.</span></p></ix:nonNumeric><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify">&#160;<span style="background-color: white"><b>&#160;</b></span></p><div>

</div><ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c0" continuedAt="_LesseeOperatingLeasesTextBlock-c0_cont_1" escape="true" name="us-gaap:LesseeOperatingLeasesTextBlock" id="ixv-7407"><table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0in"/><td style="width: 0.5in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>10</b></span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>LEASES</b></span></td>
</tr></table>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: center">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
March 22, 2021, the Company entered into a real property lease for an office located at 56B 5<sup>th</sup>&#160;Street, Lot 1, #AT, Carmel
By The Sea, California.&#160;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c0" name="us-gaap:LesseeOperatingLeaseOptionToTerminate" id="ixv-14218">The lease commenced on April 1, 2021 and is for a twelve-month period, terminating on April 1, 2022</ix:nonNumeric>.&#160;Following
the expiry of the lease term, the landlord has agreed to continue the lease on a month-to-month basis at $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c85" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:PaymentsForRent" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14219">4,800</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per month. On January
1, 2023, the Company entered into a new month-to-month lease, with a 90-day termination clause, for a monthly rental of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c86" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:PaymentsForRent" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14220">5,088</ix:nonFraction>. The lease
was terminated effective August 31, 2023.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white"><b>&#160;</b></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
Company applied the practical expedient whereby operating leases with a duration of twelve months or less are expensed as incurred.</span></p></ix:nonNumeric><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; background-color: white">&#160;</p><div>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white"><b>Small
Business Administration Disaster Relief loan</b></span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify"><b>&#160;</b></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
July 7, 2020, the Company received a Small Business Economic Injury Disaster loan amounting to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c87" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentFaceAmount" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14223">150,000</ix:nonFraction>, bearing interest at&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c87" decimals="4" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentInterestRateStatedPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14224">3.75</ix:nonFraction>%
per annum and repayable in monthly installments of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c88" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentPeriodicPayment" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14225">731</ix:nonFraction>&#160;commencing twelve months after inception with the balance of interest and
principal repayable on July 7, 2050. The loan is secured by all tangible and intangible assets of the Company. The proceeds are to be
used for working capital purposes to alleviate economic injury caused by the COVID-19 pandemic.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
company has accrued interest of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c3" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:FederalHomeLoanBankAdvancesCurrent" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14226">8,869</ix:nonFraction>&#160;and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c4" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:FederalHomeLoanBankAdvancesCurrent" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14227">9,369</ix:nonFraction>&#160;on this loan as of December 31, 2024 and 2023, respectively.</span></p></ix:nonNumeric><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p><div>

</div><ix:continuation continuedAt="_DebtDisclosureTextBlock-c0_cont_2" id="_DebtDisclosureTextBlock-c0_cont_1"><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white"><b><i>Cavalry
Fund I LP and Mercer Street Global Opportunity Fund, LLC</i></b></span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
February 16, 2021, the Company entered into separate Securities Purchase Agreements (the &#8220;SPAs&#8221;), with each of Cavalry Fund
I LP (&#8220;Cavalry&#8221;) and Mercer Street Global Opportunity Fund, LLC (&#8220;Mercer&#8221;), pursuant to which the Company received
$<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c89" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromDebtNetOfIssuanceCosts" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14256">500,500</ix:nonFraction>&#160;and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c90" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromDebtNetOfIssuanceCosts" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14257">500,500</ix:nonFraction>&#160;from Cavalry and Mercer, respectively, in exchange for the issuance of: (i) Original Issue Discount&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c91" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentInterestRateDuringPeriod" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14258">12.5</ix:nonFraction>%
Convertible Notes (the &#8220;Notes&#8221; and each a &#8220;Note&#8221;) in the principal amount of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c92" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentFaceAmount" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14259">572,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;to each of Cavalry
and Mercer; and (ii) five-year warrants (the &#8220;Original Warrants&#8221;) issued to each of Cavalry and Mercer to purchase&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c93" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:ClassOfWarrantOrRightNumberOfSecuritiesCalledByWarrants" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14260">2,486,957</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares
of Common Stock at an exercise price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c94" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14261">0.24</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">In
terms of the December 30, 2022 Note Amendment Transaction, described in more detail in note 13 below, the Original Warrants issued on
February 16, 2021 were irrevocably exchanged for 12-month non-convertible promissory notes in the amount of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c95" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:NonConvertiblePromissoryNote" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14262">482,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;(the &#8220;Exchange
Notes&#8221;) to each of Cavalry and Mercer. This exchange caused the cancellation of the Original Warrants for all purposes. The Company
accounted for the aggregate value of the notes issued of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c96" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:NotesIssued1" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14263">964,000</ix:nonFraction>, less the fair value of the warrants exchanged for these notes of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c97" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:AdjustmentOfWarrantsGrantedForServices" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14264">43,608</ix:nonFraction>,
totaling $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c98" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConvertibleDebt" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14265">920,392</ix:nonFraction>&#160;as a component of the loss on convertible debt.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
Exchange Notes have a maturity date of&#160;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c99" format="ixt:date-monthname-day-year-en" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentMaturityDateRangeStart1" id="ixv-14266">December 30, 2023</ix:nonNumeric>&#160;and carry an interest rate of ten percent (<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c99" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentInterestRateDuringPeriod" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14267">10</ix:nonFraction>%). The Company had the
right, but not the obligation, in lieu of a cash payment upon maturity of the Exchange Notes, to issue&#160;a total of <ix:nonFraction contextRef="c99" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtConversionConvertedInstrumentSharesIssued1" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14268">1,730,058</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares
of Common Stock, as adjusted for any stock splits, dividends or other similar corporate events, in full satisfaction of its obligations
under the Exchange Notes (or any pro rata portion of such number of shares in partial satisfaction of such obligations). The Company is
under no legal obligation to reserve such number of shares for future issuance.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
February 27, 2024, the maturity date of the notes was extended to April 30, 2024 with an automatic one-month extension each month until
such time as the note is declared to be in default, all other terms remain the same as the previous notes. The automatic extension of
the maturity date may not extend past November 27, 2024, thereafter all amounts due under the note are immediately due and payable. The
Company performed an analysis in terms of ASC 470 and it was determined that the extension was a debt modification, in addition, no additional
consideration was paid for the maturity date extension.</span></p></ix:continuation><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">With
effect from November 27, 2024, the notes accrue interest at 18% per annum, the default interest rate per the note agreement. </span></p><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p><div>

</div><ix:continuation id="_DebtDisclosureTextBlock-c0_cont_2"><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white"><b><i>2024
Notes</i></b></span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Between
May 29, 2024 and November 27, 2024, the Company entered into nine Securities Purchase Agreements with four accredited investors, pursuant
to which the Company issued&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c100" decimals="0" format="ixt-sec:numwordsen" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentIssuedPrincipal" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14269">nine</ix:nonFraction>&#160;non-convertible promissory notes (the &#8220;2024 Notes&#8221;) with an aggregate principal
amount of&#160;$<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c101" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentFaceAmount" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14270">577,778</ix:nonFraction>&#160;for gross proceeds of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c100" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromIssuanceOfDebt" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14271">433,333</ix:nonFraction>, after taking into account an aggregate original issuance discount of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c0" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:AmortizationOfFinancingCostsAndDiscounts" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14272">144,445</ix:nonFraction>.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
2024 Notes mature between February 28, 2025 and October 10, 2025 and bear interest at rates ranging from <ix:nonFraction contextRef="c102" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:LongTermDebtPercentageBearingFixedInterestRate" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14273">0.0</ix:nonFraction>% to <ix:nonFraction contextRef="c103" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:LongTermDebtPercentageBearingFixedInterestRate" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14274">8.5</ix:nonFraction>% per annum.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
2024 Notes have restrictions relating to fundamental transactions which require the approval of the note holder, in addition the note
holder has an optional redemption right on subsequent transactions that may require the Company to redeem all or part of the Note, at
a premium of&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c100" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentRedemptionPricePercentageOfPrincipalAmountRedeemed" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14275">120</ix:nonFraction>% of the cash amount of the Note, at the note holder&#8217;s discretion.</span></p></ix:continuation><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p><div>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px;"> <tr style="vertical-align: top"> <td style="width: 0%"/> <td style="width: 0.5in"><span style="font-size: 10pt">*</span></td> <td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><ix:footnote id="ix_3_footnote" xml:lang="en-US">The Cavalry Fund LLP and Mercer Street Global Opportunity Fund, LLC, notes are accruing interest at the default interest rate of <ix:nonFraction contextRef="c122" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:AccruingInterestRatePercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14327">18</ix:nonFraction>% with effect from November 27, 2024, prior to November 27, 2024, interest was accrued at <ix:nonFraction contextRef="c123" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:AccruingInterestRatePercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14328">10</ix:nonFraction>% per annum.</ix:footnote>&#160;&#160;</span></td></tr> <tr style="vertical-align: top"> <td/> <td><span style="font-size: 10pt">**</span></td> <td style="text-align: justify"><ix:footnote id="ix_4_footnote" xml:lang="en-US"><span style="font-size: 10pt">The Red Road Holdings Corporation and Quick Capital LLC, interest rates are effective interest rates as these convertible notes have a fixed interest charge which is earned on the issuance date, regardless of when payments are made.</span></ix:footnote></td></tr> <tr style="vertical-align: top"> <td>&#160;</td> <td>***</td> <td style="text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">All convertible notes payable
are technically in default due the default on the outstanding Red Road Holdings Corporation and the Quick Capital LLC convertible notes
disclosed below. None of the convertible note payable lenders have formally declared a default to the Company.</span></td></tr> </table></ix:nonNumeric>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Interest
expense totaled $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c124" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:InterestExpenseDebt" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14329">476,207</ix:nonFraction> and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c125" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:InterestExpenseDebt" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14330">319,543</ix:nonFraction>&#160;for the years ended December 31, 2024 and 2023, respectively.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify"><b>&#160;</b></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Amortization
of debt discount totaled $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c124" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:AmortizationOfFinancingCostsAndDiscounts" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14331">982,531</ix:nonFraction> and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c125" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:AmortizationOfFinancingCostsAndDiscounts" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14332">770,372</ix:nonFraction>&#160;for the years ended December 31, 2024 and 2023, respectively.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify"><b>&#160;</b></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
Cavalry, Mercer, Red Road Holdings Corporation convertible notes have variable conversion prices based on a discount to market price of
trading activity over a specified period of time. The variable conversion features were valued using a Black Scholes valuation model.
The difference between the fair market value of the Common Stock and the calculated conversion price on the issuance date was recorded
as a debt discount with a corresponding credit to derivative financial liability.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white"><b><i>Cavalry
and Mercer December 2022 Note Amendment Transaction</i></b></span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 13.5pt; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
Company twice extended its indebtedness to each Cavalry and Mercer. On February 3, 2022, the Company agreed to extend the maturity date
of the Cavalry/Mercer Notes to&#160;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c126" format="ixt:date-monthname-day-year-en" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentMaturityDateRangeEnd1" id="ixv-14333">August 16, 2022</ix:nonNumeric>. Additionally, on August 30, 2022, the Company entered agreements for an additional
maturity date extension to November 16, 2022. In consideration for the second extension, the Company agreed to (i) increase the principal
amount outstanding and due to Cavalry and Mercer under the Cavalry/Mercer Notes by twenty percent (<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c127" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:DebtInstrumentsInterestRateStatedPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14334">20</ix:nonFraction>%) and (ii) issue to each of Cavalry
and Mercer a new five-year warrant (each, an &#8220;Extension Warrant&#8221;) to purchase an additional&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c97" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:NumberOfAdditionalSharesPurchase" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14335">100,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of Common
Stock at an exercise price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c97" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:ExercisePricePerShare" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14336">4.50</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share. The Extension Warrant contains the same terms and provisions in all material respects
as the Original Warrants, except for the difference in exercise price.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify; text-indent: 0.5in; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
December 30, 2022, the Company again extended the maturity dates of each of the Cavalry/Mercer Notes to December 30, 2023. Each of Cavalry
and Mercer entered into Note Amendment Letter Agreement with the Company (the &#8220;Note Amendment&#8221;) pursuant to which the parties
agreed to the following:</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify; text-indent: 0.5in; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0.5in"/><td style="width: 0.25in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt">(1)</span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt">The conversion price of the
Cavalry/Mercer Notes was reduced from $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c128" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentConvertibleConversionPrice1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14337">4.50</ix:nonFraction>&#160;to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c129" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentConvertibleConversionPrice1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14338">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share (such reduced conversion price being the current conversion
price of the Notes give the passage of the November 16, 2022 maturity date of the Cavalry/Mercer Notes). As a result of this change in
conversion price, under the existing terms of the Cavalry/Mercer Notes, the&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c127" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:NumberOfUnderlyingShares" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14339">100,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of Common Stock underlying the Extension
Warrants was increased to&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c3" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightNumberOfSecuritiesCalledByWarrantsOrRights" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14340">1,304,348</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares;</span></td>
</tr></table></ix:nonNumeric><div>

This exchange caused the cancellation of the Original Warrants for all purposes. The Exchange Notes have a maturity date of&#160;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c131" format="ixt:date-monthname-day-year-en" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentMaturityDateRangeEnd1" id="ixv-14342">December 30, 2023</ix:nonNumeric>&#160;and carry an interest rate of ten percent (<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c132" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:DebtInstrumentsInterestRateStatedPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14343">10</ix:nonFraction>%). The Company is under no legal obligation to reserve such number of shares for future issuance;</span></td></tr> </table>

  </table>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify; text-indent: 0.5in; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"> <tr style="vertical-align: top"> <td style="width: 0.5in">&#160;</td> <td style="width: 0.25in"><span style="font-size: 10pt">(4)</span></td> <td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt">Certain other warrants held by Cavalry and Mercer which contain a mandatory exercise provision allowing us to force exercise of such warrants if the price of the Common Stock is $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c133" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:CommonStockDividendsPerShareDeclared" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14345">1.80</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share or above were amended effective December 30, 2022 to reduce such forced exercise price to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c134" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementsByShareBasedPaymentAwardOptionsExercisesInPeriodWeightedAverageExercisePrice" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14346">1.20</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share; and</span></td></tr> </table>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify; text-indent: 0.5in; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">As
a result of the reduction in the conversion price of the Cavalry/Mercer Notes, certain other warrants held by third parties have their
exercise price of such warrants reduced to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c97" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:ExercisePrice" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14347">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share. All of the shares of our Common Stock underlying the Cavalry/Mercer
Notes as amended and all warrants held by Cavalry and Mercer as adjusted were registered for resale pursuant to a registration statement
that was declared effective on February 6, 2023.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify; text-indent: 0.5in; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
amendments to the Cavalry/Mercer Notes were evaluated in terms of ASC 470,&#160;<i>Debt</i>, to determine if the amendments to the Cavalry/Mercer
Notes were considered a modification of the debt or an extinguishment of the debt. Based on the penalty interest incurred on the convertible
notes of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c135" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockAmountIssued1" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14348">836,414</ix:nonFraction>, the reduction in the conversion price of the Cavalry/Mercer Notes from $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c136" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentConvertibleConversionPrice1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14349">4.50</ix:nonFraction>&#160;to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c137" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentConvertibleConversionPrice1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14350">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share, which was
valued at $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c0" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:BlackScholesValuationModel" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14351">1,499,577</ix:nonFraction>&#160;using a Black-Scholes valuation model, the issuance of additional warrants to the Cavalry and Mercer valued
at $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c127" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConvertibleNotesPayable" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14352">238,182</ix:nonFraction>&#160;using a Black-Scholes valuation model and the conversion of certain warrants held by Cavalry and Mercer to notes payable,
resulting in an additional charge of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c138" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:AdditionalChargesOnConversionOfWarrant" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14353">920,392</ix:nonFraction>, consisting of a mark-to-market warrant cost of $(<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c0" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:MarketWarrantCost" scale="0" sign="-" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14354">43,608</ix:nonFraction>)&#160;and the value of the notes
of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c3" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:SeniorNotes" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14355">964,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;(see note&#160;12&#160;above) and the value of full rachet provisions of certain of the warrants issued to the Cavalry
and Mercer amounting to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c0" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:HoldersAmounting" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14356">841,003</ix:nonFraction>&#160;(see note 14 below), the amendment of the Cavalry/Mercer Notes was determined to be a debt extinguishment.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Effective
December 30, 2023 on February 27, 2024, the Company again extended the maturity dates of each of the Cavalry/Mercer Notes to April 30,
2024 with an automatic one-month extension each month until such time as the note is declared to be in default, all other terms remain
the same as the previous notes. The automatic extension of the maturity date may not extend past November 27, 2024, thereafter all amounts
due under the note are immediately due and payable. The Company performed an analysis in terms of ASC 470 and it was determined that the
extension was a debt modification, in addition, no additional consideration was paid for the maturity date extension.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white"><b><i>Cavalry
Fund LLP</i></b></span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><b><i>&#160;</i></b></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
February 16, 2021, the Company closed a transaction with Cavalry pursuant to which the Company received net proceeds of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c139" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromIssuanceOfDebt" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14357">500,500</ix:nonFraction>, after
an original issue discount of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c139" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:DebtInstrumentOriginalIssueDiscount" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14358">71,500</ix:nonFraction>&#160;in exchange for the issuance of a $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c140" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:SecuredDebt" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14359">572,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;Senior Secured Convertible Note, bearing interest
at&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c140" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:DebtInstrumentsInterestRateStatedPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14360">10</ix:nonFraction>% per annum and maturing on February 16, 2022. The Note was convertible into shares of Common Stock at an initial conversion
price of&#160;$<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c139" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:InitialConversionPricePerShare" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14361">0.23</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share, in addition, the Company issued a warrant exercisable for&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c140" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightNumberOfSecuritiesCalledByWarrantsOrRights" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14362">82,899</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of Common Stock
at an initial exercise price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c139" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementsByShareBasedPaymentAwardOptionsExercisesInPeriodWeightedAverageExercisePrice" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14363">7.20</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share.</span></p></ix:continuation><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify">&#160;</p><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">As
described more fully above, the maturity date of the note was extended to August 16, 2022, additionally to November 16, 2022, additionally
to December 30, 2023 and again to April 30, 2024, with an automatic one-month extension each month until such time as the note is declared
to be in default, all other terms remain the same as the previous notes. The automatic extension of the maturity date may not extend past
November 27, 2024, thereafter all amounts due under the note are immediately due and payable. The Company is currently negotiating with
Cavalry to place the note into forbearance, currently interest is being accrued at the default interest rate of 18% per annum in terms
of the agreement.</span></p><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p><div>

</div><ix:continuation continuedAt="_ShortTermDebtTextBlock-c0_cont_4" id="_ShortTermDebtTextBlock-c0_cont_3"><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Between
August 24, 2023 and November 20, 2023, Cavalry converted $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c145" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockAmountConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14369">139,726</ix:nonFraction>&#160;of interest and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c146" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockSharesConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14370">192,774</ix:nonFraction>&#160;of principal into&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c147" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockSharesConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14371"><ix:nonFraction contextRef="c148" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockSharesConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14372">963,769</ix:nonFraction></ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares
of Common Stock at a conversion price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c145" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:CommonStockConvertibleConversionPriceIncrease" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14373"><ix:nonFraction contextRef="c146" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:CommonStockConvertibleConversionPriceIncrease" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14374">0.345</ix:nonFraction></ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share realizing a loss on conversion of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c147" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14375">42,210</ix:nonFraction>.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;<span style="background-color: white">&#160;</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Between
September 5, 2024 and November 11, 2024, Cavalry converted an aggregate of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c149" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockAmountConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14376"><ix:nonFraction contextRef="c150" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockAmountConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14377">79,608</ix:nonFraction></ix:nonFraction>&#160;of principal and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c151" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockAmountConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14378"><ix:nonFraction contextRef="c152" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockAmountConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14379">88,876</ix:nonFraction></ix:nonFraction> of interest into&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c149" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockSharesConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14380"><ix:nonFraction contextRef="c150" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockSharesConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14381">2,005,762</ix:nonFraction></ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares

Such conversion caused a reduction
in the $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c155" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentConvertibleConversionPrice1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14386">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;conversion price of the notes described above to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c149" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementsByShareBasedPaymentAwardOptionsExercisesInPeriodWeightedAverageExercisePrice" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14387">0.084</ix:nonFraction>&#160;(see note 14).</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
balance of the Cavalry Note plus accrued interest at December 31, 2024 was $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c156" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:InterestPayableCurrentAndNoncurrent" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14388">836,942</ix:nonFraction>.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white"><b><i>Mercer
Street Global Opportunity Fund, LLC</i></b></span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify"><b><i>&#160;</i></b></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
February 16, 2021, the Company closed a transaction with Mercer, pursuant to which the Company received net proceeds of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c157" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromIssuanceOfDebt" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14389">500,500</ix:nonFraction>, after
an original issue discount of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c158" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:SecuredDebt" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14390">71,500</ix:nonFraction>&#160;in exchange for the issuance of a $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c157" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:DebtInstrumentOriginalIssueDiscount" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14391">572,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;Senior Secured Convertible Note, bearing interest
at&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c157" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:OriginalDiscountsRatePercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14392">10</ix:nonFraction>% per annum and maturing on February 16, 2022. </div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">As
described more fully above, the maturity date of the note was extended to August 16, 2022, additionally to November 16, 2022, additionally
to December 30, 2023 and again to April 30, 2024, with an automatic one-month extension each month until such time as the note is declared
to be in default, all other terms remain the same as the previous notes. The automatic extension of the maturity date may not extend past
November 27, 2024, thereafter all amounts due under the note are immediately due and payable. The Company is currently negotiating with
Mercer to place the note into forbearance, currently interest is being accrued at the default interest rate of 18% per annum in terms
of the agreement.</span></p><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p><div>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white"><b><i>2023
and 2024 Convertible Notes</i></b></span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 22.5pt; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Between
February 13, 2023 and November 27, 2023, the Company entered into Securities Purchase Agreements with 30 accredited investors to purchase
convertible notes (the &#8220;2023 Convertible Notes&#8221;). Between February 6, 2024 and October 23, 2024, the Company entered into
Securities Purchase Agreements with&#160;9&#160;accredited investors to purchase convertible notes (the &#8220;2024 Convertible Notes&#8221;).
The Company received an aggregate of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c219" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:AdditionalCollateralAggregateFairValue" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14508">2,026,666</ix:nonFraction>&#160;from the 2023 Convertible Notes and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c220" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentIncreaseAccruedInterest" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14509">575,002</ix:nonFraction>&#160;from the 2024 Convertible Notes,
in gross proceeds in private placements through the issuance of:</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0.5in"/><td style="width: 0.25in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt">&#9679;</span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt">the 2023 Convertible Notes and
the 2024 Convertible Notes; and</span></td>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0.5in"/><td style="width: 0.25in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt">&#9679;</span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt">five-year warrants to purchase
an aggregate&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c221" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:PurchaseOfAggregateShares" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14510">5,696,586</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of Common Stock associated with the 2023 Convertible Notes (the &#8220;2023 Warrants&#8221;)
and an aggregate of&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c222" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:CommonStockOtherSharesOutstanding" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14511">579,711</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of Common Stock associated with the 2024 Convertible Notes (the &#8220;2024 Warrants&#8221;),
at an exercise price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c221" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:WarrantExercisePriceIncrease" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14512">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share (as adjusted for stock splits, stock combinations, dilutive issuances and similar events).</span></td>
</tr></table>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
2023 Convertible Notes and the 2024 Convertible Notes mature between 3.5 months and 12 months from the date of issuance, bear interest
at rates between&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c223" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:DebtInstrumentsInterestRateStatedPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14513">8</ix:nonFraction>% and&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c224" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:DebtInstrumentsInterestRateStatedPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14514">12</ix:nonFraction>% per annum and are convertible into shares of Common Stock at a conversion price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c222" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentConvertibleConversionPrice1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14515">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per
share (as adjusted for stock splits, stock combinations, dilutive issuances and similar events). The 2023 Convertible Notes and 2024 Convertible
Notes may be prepaid at any time without penalty. The Company is under no obligation to register the shares of Common Stock underlying
the 2023 Convertible Notes and the 2024 Convertible Notes or the 2023 Warrants and the 2024 Warrants, for public resale.</span></p></ix:continuation><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white"><b><i>2023
and 2024 Convertible Notes (continued)</i></b></span></p><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 22.5pt; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;</p><div>

</div><ix:continuation id="_ShortTermDebtTextBlock-c0_cont_7"><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
2023 Convertible Notes, the 2024 Convertible Notes and the 2023 Warrants and the 2024 Warrants contain conversion limitations providing
that a holder thereof may not convert or exercise such securities to the extent that, if after giving effect to such conversion or exercise,
the holder or any of its affiliates would beneficially own in excess of&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c0" decimals="4" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:BeneficiallyOwnOfPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14516">4.99</ix:nonFraction>% (the &#8220;Maximum Percentage&#8221;) of the outstanding
shares of the Common Stock immediately after giving effect to such conversion or exercise. A holder may increase or decrease its beneficial
ownership limitation upon notice to the Company provided that in no event such limitation exceeds&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c0" decimals="4" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:LimitationExceedsPercentage" scale="-2" unitRef="pure" id="ixv-14517">9.99</ix:nonFraction>%, and that any increase shall
not be effective until the 61st day after such notice.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
December 14, 2023, two notes totaling $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c225" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentFairValue" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14518">225,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;($<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c226" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentFairValue" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14519">200,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c227" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentFairValue" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14520">25,000</ix:nonFraction>, respectively)&#160;which matured on December 31, 2023
were extended for an additional 3 months to March 30, 2024. In exchange for the extension, the Company issued the note holders additional
warrants exercisable for&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c225" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightNumberOfSecuritiesCalledByWarrantsOrRights" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14521">292,463</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of Common Stock at an exercise price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c228" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:SharesIssuedPricePerShare" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14522">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share. On May 4, 2024, the maturity
date of the $200,000&#160;note was further extended to June 14, 2024, and the maturity date of the $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c229" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentFairValue" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14523">25,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;note was further extended
to June 30, 2024. In exchange for the maturity date extension, the Company issued to the note holders additional warrants exercisable
for&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c225" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightNumberOfSecuritiesCalledByWarrantsOrRights" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14524">292,463</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of Common Stock at an exercise price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c228" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:SharesIssuedPricePerShare" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14525">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
March 14, 2024, the Company extended the maturity date of 11 convertible notes maturing between February 13, 2024 and February 23, 2024
by an additional six months and as consideration for the extension, the note holders were issued additional warrants exercisable for&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c230" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:WarrantExercisePrice" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14526">387,673</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares
of Common Stock at an exercise price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c230" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:CommonStockExercisePrice" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14527">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share. The modification was assessed in terms of ASC 470 and determined to be
a debt extinguishment, resulting in the warrant value of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c231" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:WarrantsAndRightsOutstanding" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14528">66,047</ix:nonFraction>&#160;being expensed as a loss on convertible notes.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">At
December 31, 2024, notes with a principal amount of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c222" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:InterestPayableCurrentAndNoncurrent" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14529">2,026,666</ix:nonFraction>&#160;and accrued interest thereon on $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c232" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentFairValue" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14530">254,901</ix:nonFraction>&#160;have matured. Between
February 11, 2025 and </span><span>February 19, 2025,</span> <span style="background-color: white">convertible
note with a total balance outstanding of </span><span>$<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c221" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:ConvertibleNoteTotalBalanceOutstanding" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14531">772,669</ix:nonFraction></span> <span style="background-color: white">had
maturity dates extended to December 31,2025 in exchange for a reduction in the conversion price of the convertible notes to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c232" decimals="2" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentConvertibleConversionPrice1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14532">0.04</ix:nonFraction> per
share. The Company will perform an analysis in terms of ASC 470 and determine whether the extension of the maturity date and the reduction
in the conversion price of the note is a debt modification or extinguishment. </span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
balance of the 2023 Convertible Notes and the 2024 Convertible Notes plus accrued interest at December 31, 2024 was $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c221" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:DebtInstrumentOriginalIssueDiscount" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14533">2,870,196</ix:nonFraction>, net of
unamortized debt discount of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c221" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="ipsi:RepaymentOfNotesPayables" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14534">40,928</ix:nonFraction>.</span></p></ix:continuation><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify; background-color: white">&#160;&#160;</p><div>

</div><ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c0" continuedAt="_DerivativesAndFairValueTextBlock-c0_cont_1" escape="true" name="us-gaap:DerivativesAndFairValueTextBlock" id="ixv-8811"><table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0%"/><td style="width: 0.5in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>14</b></span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>DERIVATIVE LIABILITY</b></span></td>
</tr></table>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
convertible notes and warrants issued by the Company to Cavalry, Mercer and RRH as described in Note 13 have variable priced conversion
rights with no fixed floor price and will re-price dependent on the share price performance over varying periods of time and certain notes
and warrants have fundamental transaction clauses which might result in cash settlement, due to these factors, all convertible notes and
any warrants attached thereto are valued and give rise to a derivative financial liability, which was initially valued at inception of
the convertible notes using a Black-Scholes valuation model.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Between
September 12, 2023 and December 20, 2023, and between April 2, 2024 and June 25, 2024, the Company entered into a convertible note agreement
with RRH which have variable priced conversion rights with no fixed floor price and will re-price dependent on the share price performance
over varying periods of time, which gave rise to a derivative financial liability, which was initially valued at inception of the convertible
notes at $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c277" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConvertibleLongTermNotesPayable" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14535">416,317</ix:nonFraction>&#160;and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c278" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConvertibleLongTermNotesPayable" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14536">268,873</ix:nonFraction>, respectively,&#160;but limited to the cash value of the convertible notes of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c279" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConvertibleLongTermNotesPayable" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14537">235,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c280" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConvertibleLongTermNotesPayable" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14538">150,000</ix:nonFraction>,
respectively, using a Black-Scholes valuation model.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
net movement on the derivative liability for the year ended December 31, 2023 was a net mark-to-market credit of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c5" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DerivativeGainLossOnDerivativeNet" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14539">1,501,446</ix:nonFraction>&#160;determined
by using a Black-Scholes valuation model.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
August 6, 2024, the Company received a conversion notice from the holder of RRH Note 2 (see Note 13) pursuant to which $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c180" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentPeriodicPayment" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14540">13,833</ix:nonFraction>&#160;of
the remaining principal, interest and late payment penalty under the RRH 2 Note was converted into&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c180" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConversionOfStockSharesConverted1" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14541">164,679</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of Common
Stock at a conversion price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c281" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentConvertibleConversionPrice1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14542">0.084</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share. As a result of the conversion of the RRH Note 2, all other outstanding promissory
notes and warrants of the Company that contain price-based anti-dilution protection had the conversion prices of such notes and the exercise
price of such warrants adjusted to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c282" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightExercisePriceOfWarrantsOrRights1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14543">0.084</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share and certain warrants of the Company that contain &#8220;full ratchet&#8221; anti-dilution
price protection had the number of shares exercisable for such warrants increased by the full ratchet provision and the conversion prices
of such warrants adjusted to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c283" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightExercisePriceOfWarrantsOrRights1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14544">0.084</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share (the &#8220;Triggering Event&#8221;).</span></p></ix:nonNumeric><div>

</div><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p><div>

<td style="width: 0%"/><td style="width: 0.5in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>14</b></span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>DERIVATIVE LIABILITY (continued)</b></span></td>

</div><ix:continuation id="_DerivativesAndFairValueTextBlock-c0_cont_1"><p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">Convertible
notes with an aggregate principal and interest balance outstanding on August 6, 2024 of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c283" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConvertibleNotesPayable" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14545">2,165,578</ix:nonFraction>&#160;have such price-based anti-dilution
protection. Based on the conversion by the RRH Note 2 as described above, the conversion price of these notes will reset to $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c284" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DebtInstrumentConvertibleConversionPrice1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14546">0.084</ix:nonFraction>. In
addition, certain warrants exercisable for&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c285" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardOptionsExercisableNumber" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14547">3,145,342</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of common stock at an exercise price of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c285" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightExercisePriceOfWarrantsOrRights1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14548">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share,
have a full ratchet provision which resulted in an increase in the number of shares of Common Stock exercisable for such warrants by&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c286" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardOptionsExercisableNumber" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14549">9,773,028</ix:nonFraction>&#160;to
a total number of shares of Common Stock exercisable for such warrants of&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c287" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightNumberOfSecuritiesCalledByEachWarrantOrRight" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14550">12,918,370</ix:nonFraction>. In addition to this, certain warrants exercisable
for&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c285" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightNumberOfSecuritiesCalledByEachWarrantOrRight" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14551">457,897</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of common stock have exercise price protection which will reduce the exercise price of these warrants to
$<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c287" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightExercisePriceOfWarrantsOrRights1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14552">0.084</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share from $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c285" decimals="3" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ClassOfWarrantOrRightExercisePriceOfWarrantsOrRights1" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14553">0.345</ix:nonFraction>&#160;per share, resulting in a decrease in potential proceeds receivable from the exercise price of
such warrants by $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c288" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ProceedsFromIssuanceOfWarrants" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14554">119,511</ix:nonFraction>.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
value of the derivative liability related to the anti-dilution price protected convertible notes and warrants was evaluated immediately
prior to the Triggering Event and immediately after the Triggering Event, resulting in an additional <span style="-sec-ix-hidden: hidden-fact-161">derivative liability</span> of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c3" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DerivativeLiabilities" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14555">4,318,669</ix:nonFraction>&#160;on
the convertible notes and $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c289" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:ConvertibleNotesPayable" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14556">2,051,405</ix:nonFraction>&#160;on the warrants. In addition, a payment was not made on a convertible note with a no notice
default clause, resulting in the triggering of a variable priced conversion feature, which gave rise to a derivative liability on the
payment due date, this gave rise to an additional derivative liability of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c290" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DerivativeLiabilities" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14557">56,329</ix:nonFraction>, both determined using a Black-Scholes valuation model.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.5in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
net mark-to-market movement of the derivative liability for the year ended December 31, 2024 was a net mark-to-market credit of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c0" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:DerivativeGainLossOnDerivativeNet" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14558">6,892,395</ix:nonFraction>,
determined by using a Black-Scholes valuation model.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

</div><ix:nonNumeric contextRef="c0" continuedAt="_ShareholdersEquityAndShareBasedPaymentsTextBlock-c0_cont_1" escape="true" name="us-gaap:ShareholdersEquityAndShareBasedPaymentsTextBlock" id="ixv-9059"><table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0%"/><td style="width: 0.5in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>15</b></span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>STOCKHOLDERS&#8217; EQUITY</b></span></td>
</tr></table>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0">&#160;</p>

<table cellpadding="0" style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; width: 100%; border-spacing: 0px;"><tr style="vertical-align: top; text-align: justify">
<td style="width: 0.5in"/><td style="width: 0.25in; text-align: left"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>a.</b></span></td><td style="text-align: justify"><span style="font-size: 10pt"><b>Common Stock</b></span></td>
</tr></table>
<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 0.25in; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.75in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">The
Company has total authorized&#160;Common Stock of&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c32" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:CommonStockSharesAuthorized" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14586">750,000,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares with a par value of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c32" decimals="4" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:CommonStockParOrStatedValuePerShare" scale="0" unitRef="usdPershares" id="ixv-14587">0.0001</ix:nonFraction>&#160;each. The Company had&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c32" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:CommonStockSharesIssued" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14588">19,081,446</ix:nonFraction>&#160;and13,<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c309" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:CommonStockSharesOutstanding" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14589">819,889</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares
of Common Stock issued and outstanding as of December 31, 2024 and December 31, 2023, respectively.</span></p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0 0pt 31.5pt; text-align: justify">&#160;</p>

<p style="font: 10pt Times New Roman, Times, Serif; margin: 0pt 0pt 0pt 0.75in; text-align: justify"><span style="background-color: white">On
May 19, 2023, in terms of a conversion notice received from a convertible note holder, the Company issued&#160;<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c310" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:StockIssuedDuringPeriodSharesConversionOfConvertibleSecurities" scale="0" unitRef="shares" id="ixv-14590">72,464</ix:nonFraction>&#160;shares of Common
Stock for the conversion of $<ix:nonFraction contextRef="c310" decimals="0" format="ixt:num-dot-decimal" name="us-gaap:StockIssuedDuringPeriodValueConversionOfConvertibleSecurities" scale="0" unitRef="usd" id="ixv-14591">25,000</ix:nonFraction>&#160;of convertible debt.</span></p>
